_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to articulate the needs of joint planners to all-source analysts.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.501), AB-S-004 (AB, cosine: 0.500).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.353). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [analysts, articulate, joint, needs, planners, source] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.893, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.033 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill to articulate the needs of joint planners to all-source analysts." and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.553 > STS 0.353 (gap +0.200). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [analysts, articulate, joint, needs, planners, source]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution].
